productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's Navy Blue Casual Shoe
description: Chic and stylish, this pair ofCanvas shoes from numero uno is light and comfortable on the feet. Team this with skirts or jeans for that cool, casual look. This shoe comes with an extra pair of coloured laces to help suit your style best.Upper Canvas upper for durability, comfort, breathability and easy maintenance Stitch detailing for durability and style Long tongue for comfort Lace-up system for snug Fit Durable rubber toe box with vertical ridges for forefoot protection and easy cleaning Branding printed on tongue and lateral midfoot for style Midsole PU midsole for durability and cushioning Padded sockliner with cambreel lining for all-day comfort Textured toe box foxing for added durability and protection to the forefoot Outsole Durable rubber outsole with ridges along the periphery and textured throughout the length of the outsole for maximum traction and grip Shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
